files_changed.description: Add hit-rate computation API to PromptCacheStats (system_prompt_total, user_context_total, system_prompt_hit_rate, user_context_hit_rate) and clear_stats() method to SessionPromptCacheStore. Derive PartialEq on PromptCacheStats for testability.

notes: Hit rate is computed as hits / (hits + misses + expired). Expired lookups count toward the denominator but not the numerator, so a high expiration rate depresses the hit rate (intentional: gives a single-number signal for cache effectiveness).
Hit rate returns 0.0 when total lookups is zero instead of NaN, so callers can render it directly without special-casing the empty case.

clear_stats() resets the shared Arc<Mutex<PromptCacheStats>> in place. Existing clones of the store (e.g. dispatched to worker threads) observe the reset on their next get_stats() call because they all share the same Arc.
Added PartialEq to PromptCacheStats so tests can assert 'all counters reset' with assert_eq! against PromptCacheStats::default(). The struct holds only u64 fields so the derive is safe and cheap.
